name: Arizona Registrar of Contractors License Records
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official posting-list page before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: The posting-list and search pages require additional research before file formats, historical coverage, and exclusions are modeled.
Local registrations or permits outside AZ ROC scope are not represented by this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented yet. Any future automated access should prefer official downloadable posting-list files if available.
publicRecordsNotes: Official source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: Arizona ROC publishes posting-list information; exact downloadable file locations and formats need follow-up research before adapter work.
researchNotes: Useful source-discovery pilot for a lookup-oriented or posting-list adapter, but not ready for parsing logic.
maintainerNotes: Do not automate portal access unless it is lawful, technically stable, and respects posted controls.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
